beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: The room goes quiet in a way that is not silence. There is a brightness beneath it — the particular light of something that is both on fire and completely still. You are not asleep. You are not awake. You are standing somewhere in between.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: A crystal forms in your hand. Asmodean — you know this somehow the way you know things in dreams, without knowing how you know them. It is beautiful and it is already fading.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: Morning. There is a fine residue on the floor where you were standing. Dust. The crystal is gone but something remains.

beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: The dust catches the light. It is not ash. It has a specific quality — structured, crystalline at the edges. Something that was real left this behind.
